title: AI's Model Context Protocols: The Future Revealed! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof explores Model Context Protocols (MCPs) and their role in AI development. The video examines current applications and speculates on future advancements in how AI systems manage and utilize contextual information.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Model Context Protocols (MCPs) and their role in AI development. It reviews current applications and speculates on future advancements in how AI systems manage and use contextual information. The relevance lies in MCPs as a mechanism for handling context across AI systems. As a shorts-format video, it stays at a high level rather than going deep on implementation.
